name: San Antonio Barbecue Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup lemon juice and 1/2 cup smoky barbecue sauce in a large food storage bag to create marinade.
2. Add the contents of one envelope of taco seasoning mix to the bag with the marinade mixture.
3. Place the fresh chicken pieces into the bag, ensuring they are fully coated with the marinade.
4. Seal the bag tightly and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or overnight for best results.
5. Once marinated, remove the chicken from the bag and discard the marinade.
6. Grill, bake, broil, or saute the chicken until it is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
7. Store any leftovers in a refrigerator.
